title: Peh
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Peh''' was a [[H'kig]] glyph that represented a mystical ideal of the peaceful religion. Considered too sacred to be written in full, the glyph was often abbreviated to "p." The glyph translated roughly into "the eternal."<ref name="Wizards">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030130jtptan|text=J't'p'tan: Temples and Tybis}}</ref>
